title: Occupational Reduction
description: Detects when a person is flattened into a stereotype based on their occupation, erasing complexity and undervaluing wider skills, resilience, and identity.
indicators: Job title used as shorthand for character or capacity
Cultural stereotypes substituting for lived complexity
Dismissal of expertise outside the occupation label
Occupational bias used to rank worth or intelligence

pad.source: inferred from keyword analysis of sensor content
